title: The Shadow Stone: An Ewok Adventure

type=Children's book |pages=29 |isbn=0394879279 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]{{InsiderCite|23|Star Wars Publications Timeline|''Star Wars'' Publications Timeline}} dates the events of the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] animated series and its accompanying [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|comic series]] to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which corresponds to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''The Shadow Stone: An Ewok Adventure''''' is a [[1986]] children's book adaptation of the ninth episode of the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] TV series, entitled "[[Sunstar vs. Shadowstone]]." {{Book-stub}} ==Plot summary== {{Plot-link|Ewoks (television series)}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from The Shadow Stone: An Ewok Adventure}} {{App |characters=
